Glymphatic clearance; hormonal regulation; immune function

notes: Lombardo 2026 PNAS: demyelination in mice. FIESTA unpublished.

key_effect_size: ERK-AMPK-mTORC1 axis; metabolic + muscle improvement
notes: IL-11 inhibitors already exist for fibrosis. Translational path plausible.

key_effect_size: Epigenetic age reversal; tissue rejuvenation across organs
notes: Sinclair 2020 NOT independently replicated. Real cancer risk dose-dependent.

key_effect_size: No human data exists
notes: Years from testing. Chemical reprogramming caused mouse deaths at high doses.

key_effect_size: NAD+ elevation confirmed; zero functional benefits in meta-analyses
notes: Two 2024 meta-analyses: no benefit on glucose insulin lipids. Zhang: 'exaggeration of benefits'.

notes: Similar profile to NMN

notes: Blunts exercise (Konopka 2019 Malin 2026). MET-PREVENT null. DPP: no cancer benefit 21yr.

key_effect_size: Only human study: 5/10 showed INCREASED bio-age
notes: Mouse lifespan claim unreplicated. Flagged by 900-day rule. FIESTA unpublished.

key_effect_size: Epidemiology: HR 0.74 (Bruneck 20yr). SmartAge primary FAILED at 0.9mg/day.
conflicts_of_interest: Madeo has equity in Longevity Labs
notes: Dose may be critical. Strong mechanism (Hofer 2024 Nat Cell Biol).

key_effect_size: Primary endpoints repeatedly missed (peak power null; 6MWT null; ATP null). Biomarker effects consistent.
notes: Immune finding interesting (Denk 2025 Nat Aging). No Phase 3. Independent HF study negative.

key_effect_size: Pfizer showed assay artifact. GSK/Sirtris program abandoned.
notes: May have indirect benefits via AMPK. ~1% oral bioavailability.

key_effect_size: 2023 Kraler: EXACERBATES cardiac injury. Associated with increased infarct in humans.
notes: Field 'at an impasse'. Original assay confused GDF11 with myostatin.

key_effect_size: Claimed 2.5yr bio-age reversal. n=9 no controls no blinding.
notes: TRIIM-X never published after 6+ years. GH/IGF-1 paradox.

key_effect_size: Brandhorst 2024: ~2.5yr bio-age reduction after 3 cycles
notes: COI is significant. Results from Longo lab only.

key_effect_size: GrimAge2 HR=2.57 for mortality. DunedinPACE strongest single predictor.
notes: Clock REVERSAL not shown to extend human lifespan. 'Thermometer problem' applies.

key_effect_size: Remarkable mouse data; no human safety data
notes: Cancer risk concern from telomerase reactivation

Reduces fat mass; improves insulin sensitivity; wide therapeutic window vs DNP
notes: Most promising uncoupler in development

key_effect_size: Phase 1 showed CNS penetrance. No efficacy signal.

Mechanism unknown
notes: Non-feminizing estrogen

mouse_lifespan_itp: 73% life extension from treatment start (old male mice)
key_effect_size: Remarkable but single study; sex-specific (male only)
notes: Kato et al 2025 Aging. Female mice not responsive after 4 months.

key_effect_size: SELECT trial: 20% CV mortality reduction in non-diabetic obese (HR 0.80 p<0.001)
notes: SELECT Phase 3 n=17604. Effect independent of weight loss. Epigenetic clock reversal -3 to -5yr in HIV RCT (PMID 40791720 post-hoc).

key_effect_size: EVOKE/EVOKE+ Phase 3: CDR-SB NOT MET. CSF biomarkers improved modestly but no cognitive benefit.
notes: EVOKE/EVOKE+ Nov 2025 Lancet. Pattern: biomarker ≠ clinical benefit in established AD. ELAD (liraglutide) Phase 2b: 50% less brain atrophy (secondary only) PMID 41326666.

key_effect_size: Mouse lifespan: 10-12% extension. Human biomarker hypothesis challenged (no age-related decline confirmed).
status: Positive in mice; human claim challenged
notes: Singh 2023 Science PMID 37289866: 10-12% mouse lifespan extension. Marcangeli 2025 Aging Cell PMID 40472098: no taurine decline with age in humans (n=137 aged 20-93). Foundational human hypothesis weakened.

key_effect_size: Bieri 2026 Cell: GPLD1 (liver exerkine) cleaves TNAP from BBB → restores tightness → cognitive rejuvenation in aged/AD mice
notes: TNAP inhibitors (SBI-425) already exist. First druggable molecular target for exercise-brain benefit. Bieri et al 2026 Cell.

key_effect_size: ~10% lifespan extension in mice; restored NAD+; decreased pro-inflammatory cytokines in human study
notes: More targeted than NMN/NR: blocks NAD+ consumption (root cause) vs flooding leaky system. 200+ inhibitors identified. Nuchido TIME+ human: increased SIRT1 NAMPT decreased inflammatory cytokines.

key_effect_size: Declines ~10-fold ages 40-80. TET demethylase cofactor. Lifespan extension in model organisms.
notes: ABLE trial (Singapore PMID 37217632): double-blind RCT with epigenetic clocks as primary outcome. Feasibility confirmed PMID 40819772. Results pending.

mouse_lifespan_itp: Not ITP-tested; AAV9-s-KL: 20% lifespan extension in mice
key_effect_size: KL-VS heterozygotes: lower neuroinflammation (PMID 39030746) lower amyloid (PMID 39529379)
notes: Klotho Neurosciences KLTO-202 (AAV9): Phase 1 ALS planned Q3 2025. Cannot be manufactured at scale for protein therapy - gene therapy is primary route.

key_effect_size: Epidemiological: regions with higher water lithium → lower dementia rates. C. elegans lifespan extension.
notes: Mechanism: GSK-3β inhibition (tau), autophagy (IP3-independent), neuroprotection. Patent problem = no industry incentive. Renal/thyroid risks minimal at microdose but long-term data absent.

key_effect_size: 18% C. elegans lifespan extension; mouse muscle/metabolic benefits; exercise-mimetic via AMPK-SART1
notes: Mitochondria-encoded. No IND filed. Phase 1 feasibility unknown. Delivery challenges.

key_effect_size: Centenarian offspring have higher levels. Neuroprotective; insulin sensitizing in animal models.
notes: Mitochondria-encoded. No trials. Delivery to CNS unsolved.

key_effect_size: Claims from single Russian lab (Khavinson). Zero independent replication. Telomere lengthening unverified.
notes: No FDA IND. No published independent replication. Evidence insufficient.

key_effect_size: Minamino 2023 Nature Aging: GPNMB vaccine cleared GPNMB+ senescent cells; improved metabolic health in mice
notes: SenoVax IND approved for cancer Phase 1. Aging trial pending cancer safety data.

key_effect_size: Bhatt 2025 Aging Cell: lamivudine reduced LINE-1 expression + SASP markers in 12 MCI patients
notes: cGAS-STING mechanism. 12-patient feasibility. Full aging RCT needed.

key_effect_size: Xu 2015: JAK1/2 inhibition suppressed SASP; physical function improved in old mice
notes: Approved for myelofibrosis/alopecia. NIA ITP interest noted. Off-label longevity use premature.

key_effect_size: LoDoCo2: 31% reduction MACE in stable CAD (HR 0.69). FDA approved Jun 2023 for CV.
notes: Mechanism: NLRP3 inflammasome inhibition. Aging generalization unproven but mechanism plausible.

key_effect_size: Hachmo 2020 Aging: telomere lengthening + senescent cell reduction claimed. n=35 no control.
notes: No controlled replication published. Claims require prospective RCT.

key_effect_size: Liu 2024: ~7.5yr cognitive age reversal vs placebo in older adults RCT
notes: Crosses BBB unlike other Mg forms. Needs independent replication at Phase 3 scale.

key_effect_size: Phase 2b: +63.4m 6MWT vs placebo; 30.8% frailty reversal vs 14.8% placebo
notes: Longeveron LMCL-B. Young-donor MSC; paracrine mechanism. FDA Phase 3 required before BLA.

key_effect_size: OMICmAge outperforms GrimAge on mortality prediction. Organ-specific brain clock: 3.1x AD risk.
notes: Clock reversal still not proven to extend lifespan. Thermometer problem applies.

key_effect_size: FDA approved May 2025 (Fujirebio Lumipulse). 96% sensitivity AD diagnosis from blood.
notes: Diagnostic not therapeutic. Enables earlier intervention trials.

key_effect_size: LASN01 Phase 1 safety: no serious AEs. CALICO $596M deal. Aging efficacy trial 2027-2029 est.
status: Phase 1 safety complete; aging trial pending
notes: Most anticipated near-term clinical translation from preclinical longevity science.

key_effect_size: Jaskelioff 2011: +21% lifespan aging mice; no cancer increase. Best telomere lifespan data available.
notes: Telomere Therapeutics pursuing DC/IPF indications. No human aging trial. Translation gap enormous.

key_effect_size: Harley 2011: ~25 bp/yr TL difference vs placebo. No lifespan data. Sponsored studies.
notes: HIGH COI: TA Sciences commercial product. No independent evidence of lifespan benefit. Cancer risk uncharacterized.

key_effect_size: Vlachos 2016 NEJM: modest hematopoietic improvement in DC; no TL lengthening
notes: Benefit only in dyskeratosis congenita. Not a healthy-aging intervention. Hepatotoxicity concern.

key_effect_size: Haycock 2017 MR: longer TL = lower CVD risk but higher cancer risk. Net lifespan effect: weak/inconsistent.
notes: Short TL associated with disease; causal role weak per MR. TeloSeq most accurate assay.

key_effect_size: In vitro PoC only. Makridakis 2021. No human IND. Delivery barriers severe.
notes: Fundamental delivery and off-target barriers. 10-20 year horizon at minimum.

key_effect_size: ITP confirmed. FDA-approved for T2D. No human longevity RCT. ACE trial tracking CV endpoints.
notes: Most underappreciated ITP hit. 20+ yrs human safety data. Urgent need for aging-specific trial.

key_effect_size: ERa mechanism confirmed (Mann 2020 eLife). Male-only effect. No human aging trial.
notes: Aromatizable estrogen. Mechanism: ERa activation. Profound sex-specific biology implications.

key_effect_size: ITP: 14% male extension. Human CVOTs: CV mortality benefit in T2D (EMPA-REG, CANVAS, CREDENCE).
notes: Pharmacokinetic sex difference explains ITP male-only effect. Aging-specific trial warranted.

key_effect_size: Largest ITP lifespan extension ever recorded. Combination eliminates acarbose sex difference.
notes: Supports mechanistically distinct combination approach. No human combination trial.

mouse_lifespan_itp: Thymic MRI: regeneration signal; Epigenetic clock: ~2.5yr reversal

notes: COI: Fahy/21st Century Medicine. No functional immune endpoints. Demands controlled trial.

mouse_lifespan_itp: Amor 2020: uPAR-targeting CAR-T cleared senescent cells in mouse models without toxicity
key_effect_size: Kill-and-rest behavior. No human aging trial. Manufacturing/cost barriers.
notes: Potentially most comprehensive senolytic approach. 10-15yr horizon for aging applications.

key_effect_size: Well-established mechanism. No approved treatment. Glucosepane dominant cross-link.
notes: Most neglected aging hallmark. Spiegel lab (Yale) pursuing glucosepane-specific breakers.

key_effect_size: BENEFICIAL Phase 3 failed primary. Program abandoned.
notes: Proof that AGE-breaker concept works in Phase 2; scale-up failed. No successor approved.

mouse_lifespan_itp: ATLAS: muscle endurance improvement. MitoImmune: naive T cell expansion.
key_effect_size: Amazentis/Nestle Mitopure. CLARITY cognitive trial pending 2026. ~30-40% non-converters bypassed by supplement.
notes: 60-70% people can't produce UA from diet. Supplement solves this. No lifespan data yet.

mouse_lifespan_itp: BMAL1 KO mice: premature aging, shortened lifespan (Kondratov 2006)
key_effect_size: No approved circadian-targeted aging therapy. TRE, sleep hygiene are proximate interventions.
notes: Clock-NAD+-SIRT1 feedback loop connects to multiple aging hallmarks. REV-ERB agonists promising but poor PK.

mouse_lifespan_itp: HR ~1.26-1.45 for mortality (Holt-Lunstad meta-analyses). Epigenetic clock acceleration confirmed.
key_effect_size: Zero-cost intervention: maintain social connections, purposeful activity.
notes: Effect size rivals pharmaceutical interventions. Structural social determinant; hard to drug.
